name: Source Discovery
goal: Find credible sources for cold-chain electricity-saving interventions.
success_metric: At least 10 credible sources, including 2 government/institutional, 2 manufacturer/technical, and 2 industry/engineering sources.

name: Facility Model Extraction
goal: Convert the facility brief into a structured facility model.
success_metric: Model is usable and does not invent unsupported details.

name: Intervention Generation
success_metric: At least 7 candidates survive basic sanity review.

name: Causalization + Red-Team
goal: Turn candidates into mechanism-aware recommendations and catch unsafe or unsupported claims.
success_metric: No restricted or unsupported recommendation enters final ranking.

name: Ranking + Evidence Docket
goal: Produce final ranked package and Evidence Docket.
success_metric: At least 3 interventions are accepted by reviewer.
